hypothesis: If MatAgent's integrated framework—combining LLM-driven planning with external tools, LLM-driven proposition of compositions, diffusion-based crystal-structure generation, and iComFormer formation-energy evaluation—is used for iterative inorganic materials discovery, then the generated compositions will achieve formation energies within ±0.25 eV/atom of the predefined targets with a higher success rate than tool-free LLM variants and MatterGen, because explicit reasoning, knowledge retrieval, and feedback-guided search steer exploration toward energetically favorable configurations.
